restaurants.description: Mediterranean small plates and entrees bringing tapas-style dining to the Westbrook shoreline.

restaurants.description: Classic American fare in a casual, no-frills setting that's been a reliable Westbrook staple.

restaurants.description: A beloved breakfast and lunch counter on Route 1 that's been serving Westbrook locals for years.
